title: Add SkiaSharp.Extended.UI.Blazor with touch canvas view and gesture view
body:
Adds a new `SkiaSharp.Extended.UI.Blazor` Razor Class Library that brings touch-enabled canvas and gesture recognition to Blazor, using the same `SKTouchEventArgs` API as the MAUI package for source sharing.

## Control hierarchy

```
SKGestureSurfaceView → SKTouchCanvasView → SkiaSharp.Views.Blazor.SKCanvasView
```

## New: `source/SkiaSharp.Extended.UI.Blazor`

- **`SKTouchAction` / `SKTouchDeviceType` / `SKTouchEventArgs`** — Mirrors the MAUI touch API exactly (same enum integer values) to enable shared touch-handling code across platforms.
- **`SKCanvasView`** — Thin wrapper around `SkiaSharp.Views.Blazor.SKCanvasView`.
- **`SKTouchCanvasView`** — Wraps the canvas in a container div; attaches browser `PointerEvent` listeners via an ES module (`SKTouchInterop.js`) and fires `Touch` as `EventCallback<SKTouchEventArgs>`. Works across mouse, touch, and stylus.
- **`SKGestureSurfaceView`** — Composes `SKTouchCanvasView` with `SKGestureEngine`. Exposes the full gesture event surface (tap, double-tap, long press, pan, pinch, rotate, fling + inertia, hover, scroll, drag lifecycle) as `EventCallback<T>` parameters.

```razor
<SKGestureSurfaceView
    OnPaintSurface="OnPaint"
    TapDetected="OnTap"
    PanDetected="OnPan"
    PinchDetected="OnPinch"
    FlingDetected="OnFling"
    Flinging="OnFlinging"
    ScrollDetected="OnScroll"
    Style="width: 100%; height: 100%;" />
```

## New: `samples/SkiaSharpBlazorDemo`

Blazor WASM app with a gesture demo page that mirrors the MAUI `GesturePage`: interactive checkerboard canvas with draggable stickers, per-gesture feature toggles, and a live event log.

## New: `tests/SkiaSharp.Extended.UI.Blazor.Tests`

23 unit tests covering:
- `SKTouchEventArgs` construction and MAUI-compatible enum values
- Touch-action → gesture-engine routing logic (the same routing used inside `SKGestureSurfaceView`)

<!-- START COPILOT CODING AGENT SUFFIX -->



<!-- START COPILOT ORIGINAL PROMPT -->



<details>

<summary>Original prompt</summary>

> Please can you add a SkiaSharp.Extended.UI.Blazor and implement the gesture view. 
> 
> Add a similar style sample app for Blazor. 
> 
> Please also create a touch event canvas view that adds the Touch event using the same SKTouchEventArgs api as the Maui api. We are going to share the same source and want to add these touch events to the actual Blazor app. But, we want to implement it here first. 
> 
> So there will be a gesture view -> touch view -> canvas view. 
> 
> Make sure we have unit tests. 


</details>
